entity.label: Crispus
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: curled, the chief of the synagogue at Corinth ( Acts 18:8 ). He was converted and, with his family, baptized by Paul ( 1 Corinthians 1:14 ).

nodes.label: Crispus
nodes.description: curled, the chief of the synagogue at Corinth ( Acts 18:8 ). He was converted and, with his family, baptized by Paul ( 1 Corinthians 1:14 ).

verses.text: And Crispus, the chief ruler of the synagogue, believed on the Lord with all his house; and many of the Corinthians hearing believed, and were baptized.
I thank God that I baptized none of you, but Crispus and Gaius;
